title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Hydrotiller to Samahan ng Magpapalay ng Bayog with Office Address at Barangay Bayog, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Gerardo M. Banasihan. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 04/12/2021)
